data.title: SALAD AND GO LAUNCHES NEW SPRING MENU FEATURING THE ARCADIA SALAD, MEDITERRANEAN REFRESH, BOULDER CANYON CHIPS AND MORE
data.description: Drive-thru lanes in Arizona and Nevada are now offering new, affordable, chef-prepared options. The fast-food brand Salad and Go aims to provide fresh, healthy meals at reasonable prices. The initiative was launched on March 25, 2026.

data.title: S&P Global Announces: Mobility Global to Host Investor Day on May 12, 2026
data.description: On March 25, 2026, S&P Global Inc. (NYSE: SPGI) revealed plans for its Mobility division, known as Mobility Global, to hold its first Investor Day on May 12, 2026, in New York City. This event comes as the division gears up for its upcoming split from S&P Global to become an independent public entity. This separation signifies a significant strategic move for the company and has garnered considerable attention in the financial markets. Investors eagerly await further details and insights into the future prospects of Mobility Global during the forthcoming Investor Day.

data.title: Unlocking Value: The Data-Driven Case for Scalable Gold Assets
data.description: Lake Victoria Gold Ltd. announced that global gold demand surpassed 5,000 tonnes in 2025. Institutional interest in gold is increasing significantly as new mining supply struggles to keep up. The news was released in Vancouver, BC on March 25, 2026.

data.title: Sign In Solutions Renews LenelS2 OpenAccess Alliance Certification
data.description: A visitor management solution provider, Sign In Solutions, has recently renewed its integration with the on-premise access control system LenelS2, benefiting enterprise customers. This comprehensive solution offers a global standard for visitor management. The announcement was made in St. Petersburg, Fla., on March 25, 2026. The service aims to enhance security and streamline visitor check-in processes for businesses. This integration is expected to improve efficiency and safety measures for companies dealing with a high volume of visitors daily.

data.title: T0SCO Expands to New Jersey Through Strategic Collaboration with High Tide Industries - Chatsworth, CA & Ocean
data.description: In Township, New Jersey on March 25, 2026, T0SCO, a prominent company specializing in scalable solventless extraction and purification technology, revealed a new partnership with High Tide Industries, a licensed class 2 cannabis manufacturer and brand platform based in New Jersey. This alliance marks an important collaboration in the industry.

data.title: Tripo AI Announces $50 Million in Funding and New Models for Production-Ready 3D Generation
data.description: Cutting-edge research has propelled the Tripo P series to revolutionize AI 3D generation, reshaping the conventional approach by directly modeling geometry within spatial space instead of relying on sequential token prediction. This breakthrough was revealed in San Francisco on March 25, 2026, as Tripo AI unveiled $50 million in fresh funding to support the development of a new era of artificial intelligence.

data.title: Keypoint Intelligence's Deborah Hawkins Named Judge for 2026 Technology Reseller Awards
data.description: Deborah Hawkins, the Workplace Team Group Director at Keypoint Intelligence, has been chosen as a judge for the 2026 Technology Reseller Awards in the UK. The event, hosted by Kingswood Tech, recognizes excellence in the UK channel. This year's awards ceremony will take place on March 25, 2026, in Fairfield, New Jersey. Deborah Hawkins' role as a judge highlights her expertise and industry recognition.

data.title: EdgeMode Expands AI Infrastructure Pipeline to 4.35GW in Spain, Establishing One of Europe’s Largest AI Development Platforms
data.description: EdgeMode has increased its AI infrastructure pipeline to 4.35 gigawatts (GW) in Spain, solidifying its position as one of Europe's leading AI development platforms. This expansion represents a significant growth in the company's capabilities and highlights its commitment to maximizing AI technology in the region. With this move, EdgeMode is poised to make a substantial impact on the AI industry in Spain and beyond.

data.title: Stock Market Today: Dow Rallies On Trump Peace Plan; Oil Prices Dive (Live Coverage)
data.description: The Dow Jones index saw a significant surge today following the announcement of President Trump's peace plan for Iran. On the other hand, oil prices experienced a sharp decline. The market was lively with these developments, with the Dow Jones index showing a notable increase. The positive response to the peace plan was evident in the market performance. In contrast, the decline in oil prices impacted the overall market sentiment. This live coverage update captures the main highlights of the day in the stock market, showcasing the impact of the peace plan on the Dow Jones index and the notable downturn in oil prices.

data.title: Sigma360 Awarded Top Adverse Media Solution and Top Adverse Media Data Ranking For Second Consecutive Year in Chartis Financial Crime and Compliance50, 2026 Report
data.description: A recent report has ranked Sigma360 as one of the top financial crime technology providers globally. The platform achieved this recognition for excelling in customer success and performance with adverse media data. Based in New York, Sigma360 is a full-stack AI platform for risk intelligence, known for its proficiency in tackling financial crimes. This achievement underscores Sigma360's commitment to innovation and excellence in the industry.

data.title: WealthReach Launches Attract, an AI-Powered SEO and AEO Engine for Financial Advisors
data.description: In New York, a recent report highlights the creation of SEO- and AEO-optimized landing pages to attract potential customers. These pages are tailored to local markets and specific services being sought by users. This strategy aims to enhance visibility and engagement.

data.title: Willow Named to Fast Company's Annual List of The World's Most Innovative Companies of 2026
data.description: In San Francisco on March 25, 2026, Willow Innovations, Inc., a trailblazer in maternal health and known for revolutionizing breast pumping technology, announced its inclusion in Fast Company's prestigious list of the World's Most Innovative Companies for 2026. This recognition serves as a testament to the company's continued dedication to innovation and advancement in the field.

data.title: Mac Murchadha Bespoke Financing Launches with New Research on $33B Sports Card Asset Class
data.description: Ensuring Institutional-Level Precision in Providing Liquidity Solutions for Private and Illiquid Assets NEW YORK, 3/26/2026 - Mac Murchadha Bespoke Financing has unveiled its official debut, offering expert advisory services tailored to design liquidity solutions for investors. Through this launch, the company aims to cater to the increasing demand for structured liquidity options, leveraging its specialized expertise to navigate the complexities of private and illiquid assets sectors.

data.title: Wellesley Asset Management Launches the Miller Convertible Total Return ETF (MCVT)
data.description: Wellesley Asset Management, Inc., a prominent investment advisory firm known for convertible securities, has introduced a new actively managed ETF on March 25, 2026. This ETF aims to optimize total return through investments in convertible securities. Based in Portsmouth, N.H., the firm is focusing on maximizing returns for investors through this new ETF.
